languages.text: "Соберите псайкеров и отправьте на одну из полярных шапок. Пусть Погонщицы отправятся туда — это займет их надолго".
"Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."
languages.original_text: "Соберите псайкеров и отправьте на одну из полярных шапок. Пусть Погонщицы отправятся туда — это займет их надолго".

traits.locale_text: "Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."
"Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."
"Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

languages.text: 「サイカーを集めて、極のどちらかに送る。そして、ドルーバーを誘い込む。そうすれば、彼らは長い間、そこで忙しくなるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

traits.locale_text: 「サイカーを集めて、極のどちらかに送る。そして、ドルーバーを誘い込む。そうすれば、彼らは長い間、そこで忙しくなるだろう。」

languages.text: «Reúnan a los psíquicos y envíenlos a uno de los polos. Atraigan allí a los Pastores; con eso tendrán entretenimiento para rato».
languages.original_text: "Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

traits.locale_text: «Reúnan a los psíquicos y envíenlos a uno de los polos. Atraigan allí a los Pastores; con eso tendrán entretenimiento para rato».

languages.text: “集结灵能者，送往行星极地，再把拒生花引过去。这样够它们忙一阵子的了。”
languages.original_text: "Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

traits.locale_text: “集结灵能者，送往行星极地，再把拒生花引过去。这样够它们忙一阵子的了。”

languages.text: "Ruft die Psioniker zusammen und schickt sie zu einem der Pole. Lockt die Treiber dorthin ... das wird sie eine Weile beschäftigen."
languages.original_text: "Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

traits.locale_text: "Ruft die Psioniker zusammen und schickt sie zu einem der Pole. Lockt die Treiber dorthin ... das wird sie eine Weile beschäftigen."

languages.text: "Ruhsezerleri toplayın ve onları kutuplardan birine gönderin. Çobanları oraya çekin. Bu, onları uzun süre oyalayacaktır."
languages.original_text: "Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

traits.locale_text: "Ruhsezerleri toplayın ve onları kutuplardan birine gönderin. Çobanları oraya çekin. Bu, onları uzun süre oyalayacaktır."

languages.text: « Rassemblez les psykers et envoyez-les à l'un des pôles. Qu'ils y attirent les Chasseurs. Cela devrait les occuper un bon moment. »
languages.original_text: "Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

traits.locale_text: « Rassemblez les psykers et envoyez-les à l'un des pôles. Qu'ils y attirent les Chasseurs. Cela devrait les occuper un bon moment. »
